html:
2024-48

Spent a lot of time reflecting this week on how to improve my life and my current circumstances.

Daily Check-In & Reflections

  • Mon 10

    PM: Played around a bit with Pico-8 and Picotron- explored ways of converting images into Pico-8 sprites, made a little minigame with the help of Claude

  • Tuesday: Worked more on my scrapbook-core script, paid for my GMRS license from the FCC

  • Wed 1

    PM: Made a new PICO-8 game to practice HAM knowledge https://www.lexaloffle.com/bbs/?tid=145776

  • Thurs: Thanksgiving

  • Fri: Relaxing, listened to Beacon HAM radio net

  • Sun: Created criterion-embedding-viz to generate embeddings for 4855 movies (9350 texts over 468 batches, using 389,205 tokens from the Nomic embedding API) - will work on visualizing these later

📚 Learning & Media
